steps: %s %s Ingredients Quantity Bacto-tryptone 72g Yeast Extract 144g Glycerol 24ml Double distilled H2O upto 5.4L

%s %s Before starting ensure six 1L bottles have been sterilised. Fill a 5.4L bell jar with 3 litres of double distilled H2O. and mark off. Then Dissolve all the ingredients and then make up to the 5.4L mark with double distilled H2O. Dispense 900ml into six sterile 1L bottles. Label,date and autoclave.
